name: PT Indospring Tbk
summary: PT Indospring Tbk manufactures and sells leaf and coil springs to the automotive industry in South East Asia. It offers parabolic, trailing, and yoko-oki leaf springs; and tension, compression, valve, and hot coil springs, as well as wire rings and stabilizer bars. The company was founded in 1978 and is based in Gresik, Indonesia. PT Indospring Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Indoprima Gemilang.
